title: hieracium subhumile
intro: Hieracium subhumile, also known as low hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Hieracium subhumile can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
